# Consuelo

> Open-source sales infrastructure for insurance teams. Power dialer, AI CRM, real-time coaching, and analytics in one platform. $20/seat. Free CRM forever.

Consuelo replaces your entire sales stack — power dialer with local presence, free CRM built on Twenty, real-time AI coaching, and analytics. Built as composable open-source packages on a Twenty CRM fork.

- Website: https://www.consuelohq.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/consuelohq/opensaas
- License: AGPL-3.0

## Features

- [CRM](https://www.consuelohq.com): Built on Twenty CRM — contacts, companies, pipelines, and deals
- [Dialer](https://www.consuelohq.com): Twilio-based calling with local presence, parallel dialing, and warm/cold transfers
- [AI Coaching](https://www.consuelohq.com): Real-time and post-call AI coaching via Groq/OpenAI with structured outputs
- [Analytics](https://www.consuelohq.com): Call analytics, metrics, and performance tracking
- [Knowledge Base](https://www.consuelohq.com): pgvector-powered document ingestion and retrieval for coaching context
- [Queue System](https://www.consuelohq.com): Power dialer with parallel dialing, DNC filtering, and queue management

## Developers

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/consuelohq/opensaas): Source code, issues, and contributions
- [README](https://github.com/consuelohq/opensaas/blob/main/README.md): Setup instructions and architecture overview

## Optional

- [Twenty CRM](https://twenty.com): The open-source CRM that Consuelo is built on
